since_last: 51% of 99 AI names green; Powering AI leads +0.52%; AI bubble risk 51 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 51% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.81% · BTC +1.21% · Gold -0.40% · Nasdaq100 +1.62%. 51% of 99 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. Powering AI is doing the heavy lifting at +0.52%.

cards.headline: Powering AI leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Powering AI at +0.52%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -0.80%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: NVT is the standout at +5.49%
cards.body: Leaders: NVT +5.49%, LEU +1.85%, NOW +1.66%, META +1.34%, BABA +1.32%. Laggards: INTC -3.15%, MU -2.72%, AMAT -2.07%, KLAC -1.95%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.36% at $150.09
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.36% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 51 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 51/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
